name: Product Comparison Table
description: This block displayes 2 – 3 products in a comparisson table manner Active column: in order to set the active column you should bold the name of that certain product.

fields.name: rows
fields.description: Author this block using the row/column table structure documented in the sidekick block page and its examples.

usageNotes: Note: bolding multiple products will result in the first product being active
Documented sample names: Product Comparison, Product Comparison with Details, Product Comparison with blue tags.
ambiguityNotes: This entry was expanded from the sidekick block docs and local source file path, but the exact authoring table/row structure should still be taken from the documented examples when generating DOCX content.
